title: citronella samoensis
intro: Citronella samoensis, also known as the 'Samoan citronella', is a type of tropical grass native to Samoa and other Pacific Island nations. It possesses medicinal properties, including its ability to repel mosquitoes and other insects, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Citronella samoensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even help in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Citronella samoensis include essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy, and dried leaves, which can be used in teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
